    B

    batch_id - Variable in class cgb.transfer.entity.Transfer
    Identifiant du lot
    BatchTransfer - Class in cgb.transfer.entity
    Classe permettant le mapping d'un tranfert par lot entre la BDD et l'API.
    BatchTransfer() - Constructor for class cgb.transfer.entity.BatchTransfer
     
    batchTransferRepository - Variable in class cgb.transfer.service.BatchTransferService
     
    BatchTransferRepository - Interface in cgb.transfer.repository
    Classe représentant la table des tranferts dans la DB.
    BatchTransferRequest - Class in cgb.transfer.dto
    La classe de DTO d'un transfert.
    BatchTransferRequest() - Constructor for class cgb.transfer.dto.BatchTransferRequest
     
    BatchTransferRestController - Class in cgb.transfer.controller
    Classe de gestion de la route pour la gestion des transferts par lot.
    BatchTransferRestController() - Constructor for class cgb.transfer.controller.BatchTransferRestController
     
    batchTransferService - Variable in class cgb.transfer.controller.BatchTransferRestController
     
    BatchTransferService - Class in cgb.transfer.service
    La classe de Service permettant le lien entre Repository et Controller.
    BatchTransferService() - Constructor for class cgb.transfer.service.BatchTransferService
